_rationale: code_insight mode=git_hotspots is the second git-flavoured branch (separate dispatch from git_analyze even though both fall back to empty-statistics on a no-git corpus). After iter-5 fix, C++ emits a byte-identical 303-byte LCF payload to Go: mode=git_hotspots header + STATISTICS section with zero values. Probe: /tmp/parity-iter4/code_insight___mode___git_hotspots.{go,cpp}.json both 303 bytes after rebuild. Locks the git_hotspots dispatch branch separately from git_analyze so a one-off regression on either side is locally pin-pointed.

tiers._rationale_stable: Envelope matches MCP spec. result.content[].text byte-for-byte identical on multi-lang corpus's empty-git-history fallback path. Like mode-git_analyze, this descriptor locks dispatch + empty fallback; a populated-git corpus descriptor would lock real hotspot content in a future iter.
